featureList: Last-mile route optimization from your orders
Faster deliveries and lower operational cost

hero.description: We build technology that moves delivery operations forward. One product. One focus.

items.name: Avernsys FlowSys
items.description: Enter your orders. Get optimized delivery routes in seconds. Faster deliveries, lower costs, zero guesswork.

titleLines: We build what should already exist.

hero.description: Avernsys was built on a simple belief: technology should connect people and make things work better. That's what we do.

story.title: Our story
paragraphs: Avernsys started with two people who saw how much time businesses lose to inefficient last-mile logistics.
Instead of waiting for someone else to solve it, we built FlowSys: route optimization software that turns delivery orders into efficient routes in seconds.
We're a company that believes in doing fewer things exceptionally well. FlowSys is built with care, designed to last, and focused on one operational problem that matters.

doruk.bio: Former engineer at Amazon, where he built systems that power global logistics at scale. Conducted computer vision research at UCLA, then joined Tesla to work on the perception systems behind autonomous driving. Brings deep expertise in optimization, machine learning, and building technology that operates in the real world.

murat.bio: Comes from the advisory and consulting world, with experience at both PwC and Deloitte - two of the Big Four. Specializes in business strategy, operations, and helping organizations scale intelligently. Understands how enterprises think, what they need, and how to deliver solutions that earn their trust.

items.title: Craft over compromise
items.description: Every detail matters. We obsess over the experience because our users deserve software that feels considered, not just functional.

items.title: Ship what matters
items.description: We solve real problems for real people. If it doesn't serve the user, it doesn't ship.

items.title: Stay lean, move fast
items.description: Two founders. No bureaucracy. We make decisions quickly, iterate constantly, and let the work speak for itself.

hero.description: Enter your orders. Get optimized delivery routes in seconds. Faster deliveries, lower costs, zero guesswork.

items.title: Enter your orders
items.description: Upload your delivery list - addresses, time windows, package details. Drag and drop or integrate via API.

items.title: We optimize
items.description: Our engine calculates the fastest, most efficient routes in real time. Every variable considered. Every second counts.

items.title: Deliver smarter
items.description: Your drivers get turn-by-turn optimized routes. You get happier customers and lower operational costs.

features.label: Speed
features.title: Results in seconds, not hours.
features.description: The FlowSys optimization engine processes thousands of delivery points in real time. No waiting, no manual route planning. Just instant, optimized routes your drivers can follow immediately.

features.label: Optimization
features.title: Every route, mathematically optimal.
features.description: We factor in traffic patterns, delivery windows, vehicle capacity, and driver constraints. The result: fewer miles, less fuel, more deliveries per route - and customers who get their orders on time.

features.label: Integration
features.title: Plugs into what you already use.
features.description: API-first architecture means FlowSys works with your existing systems. Connect your order management, warehouse, or e-commerce platform. Up and running in hours, not weeks.

cta.description: Whether you deliver 50 orders a day or 5,000, FlowSys scales with you. Let's optimize your last mile.

hero.description: Have a question, want a demo, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.

success.title: Message sent.
